ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "pol_eff_dt" TEXT /* Effective date of the policy */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the policyholder */,
  "agecat" INTEGER /* Age category of the policyholder */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the policyholder */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the policyholder */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area where the policyholder lives */,
  "traffic_index" REAL /* Traffic index of the area */,
  "veh_age" INTEGER /* Age of the vehicle */,
  "veh_body" TEXT /* Body type of the vehicle */,
  "veh_value" REAL /* Value of the vehicle */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance policy */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy */,
  "insured_amount" REAL /* Total amount insured under the policy */,
  "policy_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the policy */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who issued the policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the claim belongs to */,
  "claim_office" TEXT /* Office where the claim was filed */,
  "numclaims" INTEGER /* Number of claims filed */,
  "claimcst0" REAL /* Total cost of the claim */,
  "annual_premium" REAL /* Annual premium for the policy */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was filed */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of the claim */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the claim */,
  "claimant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claimant (customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_claim_office FOREIGN KEY ("claim_office") REFERENCES claim_offices ("office_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the office */,
  "office_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the office */,
  "office_manager" TEXT /* Name of the office manager */,
  "office_email" TEXT /* Email address for the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the policyholder
Total amount insured under the policy
ID of the agent who issued the policy
ID of the policy the claim belongs to
Office where the claim was filed
Date when the claim was filed
